name: BCM Resources Corporation
summary: BCM Resources Corporation engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and mining of mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for molybdenum, copper, gold, and silver. Its flagship project is the Shan property that covers an area of approximately 7,604 hectares located in British Columbia. The company was formerly known as BC Moly Ltd. and changed its name to BCM Resources Corporation in February 2006. BCM Resources Corporation is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
